debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1

⊢ ¬Matroid.IsColoop (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
intro hcol
  rcases h x with ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩
  have hxE : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E := by

  have hxcl : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.closure (∅ : Set α) := by

  have hxind : (∅ : Set α) ⊆ G.matchingMatroid.E := by

  have : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.E :=

  have hxloop : G.matchingMatroid.IsLoop x := by
    simpa [Matroid.isLoop_iff_mem_closure_empty] using hxcl
  have : x ∉ V(G, M) := hxM
  have hxind' : ¬ (∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ ({x} : Set α) ⊆ V(G, M)) := by
    intro hcontra
    rcases hcontra with ⟨M', hM', hxsub⟩
    exact this (hxsub (by simp))
  have hxind'' : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Indep ({x} : Set α) := by
    simpa [matchingMatroid, matchingIndepMatroid, Matroid.IndepMatroid.matroid] using hxind'
  have hxind''' : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Indep ({x} : Set α) := by
    exact hxind''
  have hxind'''' : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Indep ({x} : Set α) := hxind'''
  have : False := by
    have hxind0 : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.Indep ({x} : Set α) := hxind''''
    have hxloop' : G.matchingMatroid.IsLoop x := hxloop
    have : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := by
      intro hco
      have : x ∈ G.matchingMatroid.closure (∅ : Set α) := by
        simpa [Matroid.isColoop_iff_mem_closure_empty] using hco
      exact hxind0 (by
